document.title: Compliance Declaration
authorityOrJurisdiction: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada (ISED)

sourceSummary.oneLine: Laird Connectivity compliance declaration stating the device was tested to ICES-003 Issue 6 and evaluated against ICES-003 Issue 7 updates.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports evidence of continued compliance with ISED ICES-003 Issue 7 requirements for information technology equipment including digital apparatus.
keyPoints: The device was originally tested to ICES-003 Issue 6 requirements.
The device was evaluated to updates published in ICES-003 Issue 7.
The product continues to observe compliance with requirements set by Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada.

entities.name: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada (ISED)
entities.evidence: requirements set forth by The Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada (ISED)

concepts.name: ICES-003 Issue 6
concepts.evidence: originally tested to the requirements of ICES-003 Issue 6

concepts.name: ICES-003 Issue 7
concepts.evidence: complies with the updates published in ICES-003, Issue 7

evidence.claim: The document is a compliance declaration.
The device was originally tested to ICES-003 Issue 6 requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: This device was originally tested to the requirements of ICES-003 Issue 6, Information Technology Equipment (Including Digital Apparatus) — Limits and Methods of Measurement

evidence.claim: The device was evaluated to ICES-003 Issue 7 updates.
evidence.evidenceText: evaluated to the updates published in ICES-003, Issue 7, Information Technology Equipment (Including Digital Apparatus)

evidence.claim: The product continues to comply with ISED requirements and ICES-003 Issue 7 updates.
evidence.evidenceText: this product continues to observe compliance to the requirements set forth by The Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada (ISED), and complies with the updates published in ICES-003, Issue 7

evidence.claim: The copyright holder identified in the source is Laird Connectivity.
